articles.title: Kalshi Hits $10B In Volume For March, With A Week Still Left
articles.summary: Kalshi crushed $10B in trading volume for March with seven days still remaining in the month, putting them on pace for their biggest month ever. This surge signals prediction markets are finally hitting mainstream adoption, giving bettors more liquidity and tighter spreads across political and economic events.

articles.title: Retail traders fare worse on prediction markets than sportsbooks
articles.summary: Retail traders are losing money faster on prediction markets than they do betting on sports, suggesting these platforms might be even tougher to beat than traditional sportsbooks. This could signal that prediction markets attract sharper money and more sophisticated participants, making them a rougher playground for casual bettors looking for easy wins.

articles.title: Wealthsimple clears regulatory hurdle to bringing prediction trading to Canada
articles.summary: Wealthsimple just got regulatory approval to launch prediction trading in Canada, marking the first major fintech to crack the notoriously conservative Canadian financial regulatory system. This opens the floodgates for mainstream prediction market adoption north of the border, where millions of Canadians have been locked out of the action while watching Americans bet on everything from elections to interest rates.

articles.title: When Will Trump Visit China? Kalshi Predictions, Odds
articles.summary: Kalshi traders are betting on when Donald Trump will make his first visit to China as president, with markets pricing in the diplomatic timeline. The odds reveal how bettors expect Trump's trade war rhetoric to translate into actual foreign policy, making it a key indicator for geopolitical prediction markets.

articles.title: An Evening at Polymarket’s Totally Broken Pop-up Bar
articles.summary: Polymarket threw a pop-up bar event that apparently went sideways, with broken systems or operations that left attendees frustrated. The incident highlights how the platform's real-world marketing efforts might be as glitchy as their occasional technical issues, potentially undermining user confidence just as they're trying to mainstream prediction markets.

articles.title: Strait of Hormuz tanker traffic won't return to normal for months, Kalshi bettors predict
articles.summary: Kalshi traders are betting that tanker traffic through the critical Strait of Hormuz will remain disrupted for months, not weeks. The market signal suggests bettors expect prolonged geopolitical tensions or infrastructure damage that could keep oil prices elevated and shipping routes unstable.

articles.title: CFTC forms new innovation task force to shape crypto, artificial intelligence and prediction markets
articles.summary: The CFTC just launched a new innovation task force to tackle regulation around crypto, AI, and prediction markets. This could finally bring the regulatory clarity that prediction market operators have been desperately waiting for, potentially opening the floodgates for more platforms to operate legally in the US.

articles.title: Exclusive: Trader made nearly $1 million on Polymarket with remarkably accurate Iran bets
articles.summary: A trader scored nearly $1 million on Polymarket by nailing a series of Iran-related bets with uncanny precision. This shows how geopolitical expertise can translate into massive prediction market profits, likely attracting more serious money and talent to these platforms.

articles.title: Analysis | Taking a gamble on prediction markets
articles.summary: Mainstream media is finally waking up to prediction markets as more than just gambling curiosities, likely examining their growing influence on everything from elections to economic forecasting. This signals prediction markets are hitting a credibility tipping point where traditional institutions can't ignore their track record of outperforming polls and expert predictions.

articles.title: Lawmakers Introduce Bipartisan Bill Banning Sports Bets on Prediction Markets
articles.summary: Congress wants to stop prediction markets from offering bets on sports games, introducing legislation that would create a clear wall between political predictions and athletic outcomes. The move signals lawmakers are trying to legitimize prediction markets for policy forecasting while keeping them away from the massive sports betting industry that generates billions in tax revenue.

articles.title: Polymarket’s Coming-Out Party in Washington Was a Disaster
articles.summary: Polymarket's first major Washington DC event to court regulators and legitimize prediction markets went sideways, likely featuring awkward exchanges between crypto-betting executives and skeptical policymakers. The fumbled debut signals that regulatory acceptance remains elusive, which could keep institutional money on the sidelines and force serious bettors to stick with overseas platforms.

articles.title: Illinois Regulators Say Prediction Markets Are Illegal Gambling, But Bettors — And The Trump Family — Love Them
articles.summary: Illinois regulators just declared prediction markets illegal gambling, setting up a direct clash with the booming industry that's attracted everyone from retail bettors to the Trump family. This signals a broader regulatory crackdown that could fragment the US market and force platforms to navigate a patchwork of state-by-state rules.
